name: clash_manager_detect_clashes_between_host_and_linked_model_by_bounding_box
desc: Clash detection between linked model elements and host MEP services. Returns clashes and host element IDs for section box.

parameters.name: linkName
parameters.description: Optional link name filter (partial match). If empty, all links.

parameters.name: linkedFilter
parameters.description: Category filter: 'structural' (default), 'all', or comma-separated category names.

parameters.name: hostElementIds
parameters.description: Optional JSON array of host element IDs. If empty, uses all MEP elements in host.

parameters.name: useSelectionForHost
parameters.description: If true and hostElementIds empty, use current selection as host set. Default false.
